description: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL fallback bug: empty string is falsy in JS so || fell back to localhost:3001 in production
resolution: Use nullish coalescing ?? instead of || so empty string means relative paths work correctly

name: inline-error-banners
description: Use flex+AlertCircle div with border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 for inline error states instead of alert() or toast; avoids needing Toaster mounted in layout. Success states use border-green-500/50 bg-green-500/10.
